category_sources: source_facts.description says "Rust toolchain installer"; official rustup book says rustup installs Rust from official release channels and manages compiler channels.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rustup; official rustup book and source repository use rustup.
docs_sources: Official rust-lang.github.io rustup book is dedicated documentation; official repository README is a secondary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/rust-lang/rustup, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Rust toolchain installer; official rustup book describes compiler channel switching, updates, and cross-compiling support.
